name: input-group
visual_summary: A flexible input group component used to enhance user interaction with input fields. It consists of an optional label, a main input field, and an optional button for submitting or clearing the input value. Developers can use it in various parts of the application, such as forms, settings panels, or search input areas.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: input-group
Description: A flexible input group component used to enhance user interaction with input fields. It consists of an optional label, a main input field, and an optional button for submitting or clearing the input value. Developers can use it in various parts of the application, such as forms, settings panels, or search input areas.
Style: flat, rounded, borderless
Interactions: hover, focus, clickable
Tags: input, form, settings, search

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
